form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 410m at this track in a handy (23.41), beating Paw Jasta. Can make it two on the bounce.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 410m. Last start finished 6th on March 31 over 410m at this track behind Paw Zevon beaten 7 lengths (24.11) in a Mix 3/4. Forward showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 410m. Last start finished 6th on March 31 over 410m at this track behind Paw Zevon beaten 7 lengths (24.11) in a Mix 3/4. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split and led until late but gathered in when a 4 length fifth at Warrnambool over 390m in 22.35. Has an exceptional 23.14 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has been in tremendous form, putting three wins back-to-back. Last start won comfortably by 3.5 lengths at this track (23.57) beating Paw Palmer in a Mix 3/4 on March 31. In hot form and can take this out.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (24.23) when fourth over 425m at Bendigo in a Grade 4/5. Has two wins and seven placings from 15 starts from the draw. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 410m at this track. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Showed strong early pace and stuck on well despite finishing out of the placings when fourth over 390m Warrnambool in 22.61. Last run is a strong form reference. Worth following up.
